1 BENE_ID Encrypted 723 CCW Beneficiary ID CHAR 15 X X X X A unique CCW beneficiary identifier field (BENE_ID) that is specific to the Chronic Condition Warehouse. This field is encrypted prior to delivery to researchers. The BENE_ID field is used to
